                        -H/home/alex/Development/Sandbox/chatmcp/third_party/pdf_render_patched/android

-DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON
-DCMAKE_SYSTEM_VERSION=21
-DANDROID_PLATFORM=android-21
-DANDROID_ABI=x86_64
-DCMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI=x86_64
-DANDROID_NDK=/home/alex/android-sdk/ndk/27.0.12077973
-DCMAKE_ANDROID_NDK=/home/alex/android-sdk/ndk/27.0.12077973
-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=/home/alex/android-sdk/ndk/27.0.12077973/build/cmake/android.toolchain.cmake
-DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=/home/alex/android-sdk/cmake/3.22.1/bin/ninja
-DCMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=/home/alex/Development/Sandbox/chatmcp/build/pdf_render/intermediates/cxx/RelWithDebInfo/4l2f5p24/obj/x86_64
-DCMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=/home/alex/Development/Sandbox/chatmcp/build/pdf_render/intermediates/cxx/RelWithDebInfo/4l2f5p24/obj/x86_64
-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo
